notes: Covers Smackover, Marcellus-like, and Bakken-relevant grades without drifting into weak Permian as the main case.
Used as a feature and cost/process stress variable; not a standalone fitted extraction response unless Agent 2 validates it.
Use log or stratified sampling because the selected feeds span low-comparison to high-stress sodium burden.
Use mass-ratio basis unless Agent 2 explicitly replaces it with a density-corrected convention.
Keeps sampling near the source-paper domain and avoids broad thermal extrapolation.
Avoids pH above 11 because the roadmap flags third-phase or emulsion risk.
Do not vary TOPO in the main case-study design.
Do not vary TBAC:DA in the main case-study design.
Integer stage count for staged extraction and costing sensitivity.
Nonzero values flag residual Ca/Mg/Sr/Ba risk; they are not active extraction species.
Permian remains landscape context only unless new high-Li data are added.
